top.head: while trading
top.text: It’s a well-known fact: to turn profit traders have to stay calm and collected. You might think: “Some things are easier said than done”, but don’t worry - we’ve got tips to help you stay cool-headed in the heat of a trading battle.

emotion.head: Identify your emotions
emotion.text: An important skill to develop for any trader is the ability to identify one’s emotions. Learn to pause and notice when you are anxious, angry or overly excited. Dialing back at that point is crucial, because otherwise you may suffer losses.

learn.head: LEARN TO STEP BACK
learn.text: If you’re noticing that losing trades are starting to prevail, maybe it’s a sign to take a break and regroup. The same applies to a winning streak: it’s all too common for traders to get carried away and blow their profit.

stick.head: Stick to the plan
stick.text: Experienced traders set a limit on winning and losing trades and stick to it. This helps them to stay level-headed and to control risks even when the situation gets heated.
